# Divine Cartography
## Scripture
> "The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of his hands." - Psalm 19:1

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the starry night sky, we are reminded of God's majestic creation. The celestial map above us is a testament to His infinite power and wisdom. Just as cartographers chart the terrain of our earth, God has mapped out the vast expanse of the universe, guiding the movements of planets and stars. In the same way, He has a divine plan for our lives, navigating us through the twists and turns of our journey. The constellations, like old friends, appear in the sky, reminding us of God's promises and faithfulness.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the beauty of the night sky, we are awestruck by Your glory and majesty. Help us to trust in Your divine cartography, knowing that You have a plan to guide us through life's uncertainties. Just as the stars shine bright in the darkness, may Your light shine in our hearts, illuminating our path and filling us with wonder and praise. May we declare Your glory to all, just as the heavens declare Your handiwork. Amen.
